Who We Are

We don't just install lights —
we transform your evenings.

Landscape Illuminations is a locally owned business serving homeowners across Birmingham and the Lake Martin area. Every project starts with a free in-person consultation, and we don't call it done until you're completely satisfied.

When you work with us, you're working with the same people from first call to final walkthrough — not a franchise, not a call center.

Free

Design Consult

6

Days a Week

100%

Satisfaction

Learn More About Us

What We Do

What we can do
for your property.

All Services
01

Landscape Up-Lighting

Highlight your trees, columns, and architectural details with carefully aimed fixtures that bring out the best of your home at night.

02

Security Lighting

Light up the dark corners of your yard and keep your family safe — without making your home look like a parking lot.

03

Patio & Deck Lighting

Turn your outdoor space into somewhere you actually want to spend the evening. Great lighting makes all the difference.

04

Walkway Lighting

Guide guests to your front door safely and in style. Low-profile fixtures that look great day or night.

05

Driveway Lighting

Make a great first impression from the street and improve visibility when pulling in after dark.

06

Custom Design

Not sure what you need? We'll walk your property and put together a plan that fits your home and budget perfectly.

How It Works

Simple from start
to switch-on.

You Reach Out

Call, text, or fill out our form. We get back to you fast to set up your free consultation.

Free Site Visit

We come to your property, walk the yard with you, and put together a custom lighting design at no cost.

We Install It

Our team handles everything — clean installation with hidden wiring and perfectly placed fixtures.

You Love It

We walk the property with you at night before we leave. We don't call it done until you're 100% satisfied.
